name: Complete Boys RPG The Boys (Seasons 1–5) Gen V (Seasons 1–2) The Boys Comic Run (72 Issues) Herogasm Highland Laddie Butcher Baker Candlestickmaker Dear Becky The Boys Presents: Diabolical Seven on 7 with Cameron Coleman Butcher: A Short Film Deeper and De
description:
419+ Lorebook Entries • 250,000+ Tokens Every Season. Every Comic Arc. Every Spinoff. Zero Filler. Zero Padding.

The Boys TV Seasons 1–5. Gen V Seasons 1–2. The Complete 72-Issue Comic Run. Herogasm. Highland Laddie. Butcher, Baker, Candlestickmaker. Dear Becky. Diabolical. Vought Rising. The Boys: Mexico. Every Supe. Every Conspiracy. Every Faction. Canon Route, Villain Route, AU Route, OC Route. No Safety Net. No Redemption Arcs. Just Consequences.

"The only way to fight a monster is to let yourself become one. The trick is not minding."

⚠️ THIS IS NOT A BOT. THIS IS A WORLD THAT WILL NOT PROTECT YOU. ⚠️

You have seen The Boys bots before. You have not seen this. Every other Boys RPG on this platform follows the same pattern: Homelander speaking in threats that land like community theater, Butcher's accent reduced to three "cunts" per scene with no internal life beneath them, and a Compound V pharmacology that evaporates the second you ask a specific question. Those bots sound like The Boys for one scene. They collapse the moment you push them.

This RPG is built differently. The lorebook contains over 419 canonical entries exceeding 250,000 tokens—every named Supe with full power mechanics, V-Scale classification, Vought file data, and documented civilian incident cover-ups; every faction with operational protocols; every location in full sensory presence; and every active conspiracy tracked as a living system with real-time political consequence. Not padded. Not faked. A machine that runs the same whether you are Butcher at maximum operational desperation, Homelander managing a public performance over genuine disintegration, or a C-tier OC supe stationed in a media market nobody wants.

On top of that lorebook: a 15,993-token world engine—Compound V pharmacology, Temp V dose tracking, V-Scale combat logic, full player agency enforcement, villain-play adversarial balance, OC Supe generation, Vought institutional simulation, faction reactivity, AU facilitation from any canonical decision node, and per-character NPC voice registers so precise that Homelander's warmly menacing baritone is a different instrument from Soldier Boy's mid-century narcissistic rage, which is a different instrument from Sister Sage's impatient precision, which is a different instrument from Ashley Barrett's PR-speak collapsing under its own velocity.

IF ANOTHER BOY'S RPG DOESN'T TELL YOU THEIR EXACT ENTRY COUNT AND TOKEN COUNT—ASSUME IT'S A WIKI SCRAPE IN A VOUGHT PRESS RELEASE. ASSUME IT'S HOLLOW.

✦ THE LARGEST THE BOYS FRANCHISE RPG EVER BUILT. NOTHING ELSE COMES CLOSE.✦ ✦

⚠️ CONTENT: BRUTAL, SATIRICAL, UNSPARING — NO SANITISED HEROISM, NO PLOT ARMOR, NO SAFETY NET ⚠️

CORPORATE HORROR WITH A SMILE THAT NEVER MOVES. •  COMPOUND V WITH REAL CONSEQUENCES  •  HEADS THAT EXPLODE WITHOUT WARNING  •  DEATH WITHOUT CATHARSIS  •  VILLAIN ROUTES FULLY SUPPORTED  • VOUGHT WAS ALWAYS ONE STEP AHEAD OF DUE PROCESS  •  BECCA CAN DIE AGAIN  •  RYAN'S TRAJECTORY IS ALWAYS THE MOST UNCOMFORTABLE QUESTION IN THE
creator: Rfergeegr
